name: my-own-suite
description: My Own Suite is an easy-to-deploy self-hosted SaaS alternative that helps people replace Big Tech tools with privacy-first open-source apps they control.

scripts.build: npm run branding:sync && cd site && npm install --no-audit --progress=false && npm run build
scripts.e2e:install: npm --prefix tests/e2e install && npm --prefix tests/e2e run install:browsers
scripts.e2e:onboarding:manual: powershell -Command "$env:MOS_E2E_PAUSE_AFTER_ONBOARDING='1'; cmd /c npm --prefix tests/e2e run test:onboarding:manual"
scripts.vps:rebuild: npm run vps:init && npm run vps:doctor && docker compose -f deploy/vps/docker-compose.yml --project-directory deploy/vps --profile vaultwarden --profile seafile --profile onlyoffice --profile stirling-pdf --profile radicale --profile immich down --volumes --remove-orphans && docker compose -f deploy/vps/docker-compose.yml --project-directory deploy/vps --profile vaultwarden --profile seafile --profile onlyoffice --profile stirling-pdf --profile radicale --profile immich up -d --build --force-recreate
scripts.vps:up: npm run vps:init && npm run vps:doctor && docker compose -f deploy/vps/docker-compose.yml --project-directory deploy/vps --profile vaultwarden --profile seafile --profile onlyoffice --profile stirling-pdf --profile radicale --profile immich up -d --build
